summary: A Go-based monolithic tool leveraging MCP for handling migrations and executing test runners, heavily driven by automated AI agent workflows.
concerns: Highly fragmented agent-generated test directories (0005-0014) suggest complex CI/agent orchestration overhead
Heavy reliance on extra tests (*_extra_test.go) might indicate gaps in primary test coverage
Clean git status combined with numerous post-merge metadata commits hints at automated commit noise
suggestions: Consolidate or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to reduce repository clutter
Review primary test suites to ensure they are robust enough to reduce the need for supplementary extra tests
Focus on the core runner and MCP handler logic for performance and reliability improvements
